protocol.strict_mdd: includes in-position adverse excursion and period-contained forced exits
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTCUSDT/BTC only unless explicitly changed by user
protocol.feature_inputs: External explanatory variables are allowed if merged causally: DXY, kimchi, USDKRW, Upbit BTC, BTC derivatives, and optionally other-coin lead/lag. They do not imply changing the traded asset.
protocol.alpha_pool_threshold: Feature/gate discoveries are promoted into alpha_pool only when a combined strategy clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=2.5; live-grade standalone requires >=3.0.

feature_tiers.alpha_feature: Strictly promoted feature family: directly tied to strategy-level edge. Requires a combined strategy using this feature to clear test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5, or a standalone/live-grade strategy using it to clear >=3.0, with nontrivial trades and reproducible recipe.
feature_tiers.beta_feature: Potential alpha-feature pool: plausible edge remains, but current evidence has not met alpha-feature promotion threshold. Use for selector/gate/exit experiments with strict contamination notes.
feature_tiers.gamma_feature: Strict noise/failure pool: only for feature families where evidence strongly shows the attempted usage is noise/invalid/repeatedly non-causal. Gamma means avoid similar retries unless the recorded disqualifying evidence is overturned.

beta_to_alpha_feature: A reproducible strategy using the feature clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5 after 6bp/side, strict in-position MDD, split-end forced close.
Trade support is not trivial: normally test2024 >=20 trades and eval2025 >=15 trades, unless explicitly marked sparse low-frequency and manually accepted.
Eval2025 is not clearly broken: positive CAGR and no obvious MDD explosion; live-grade standalone requires CAGR/strict_MDD >=3.0.
Feature contribution is identifiable versus baseline/no-feature variant or portfolio marginal contribution.
generation_recipe and usage evidence are complete.
beta_to_gamma_feature: Requires strong evidence that the attempted feature family/usage is only noise, not merely below current alpha/live thresholds.

Acceptable evidence: repeated broad + targeted scans show no robust positive test/eval structure and no useful selector contribution; or leakage/no-op/causal invalidation; or consistent regime inversion/OOS collapse across independent variants.
Gamma entry must name the exact failed usage mode. If a different usage mode remains plausible, keep that feature family in beta and put only the failed search set/provenance in gamma.
Do not gamma-demote broad inventories or search sets just because they are not alpha features; they should be provenance unless they encode a failed/noisy usage mode.
Do not gamma-demote because live-grade is missing; beta is for remaining alpha-feature possibility.
gamma_to_beta_feature: Only allowed if new data, corrected methodology, or a materially different usage mode removes the recorded failure reason.
Must show at least one reproducible combined strategy with test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=1.5 and positive eval2025, or strong portfolio-selector contribution before alpha threshold.

entries.next_action: Do not repeat standalone Alpha101 quantile scans; use alpha101_vpin_primitives beta entry only for selector/gate experiments.

entries.name: Cross-venue local impulse × Binance microstructure symmetric consensus usage
entries.description: Exact failed usage mode combining one Korean local/FX impulse feature with one Binance volume-clock, jump, or liquidity-recovery feature through fixed symmetric agreement/disagreement tails.
usable_for: failure provenance only; underlying feature families may be reconsidered through a materially different dynamic regime model
known_failures: All pre-2024 Top-10 candidates failed alpha-pool qualification.
Rank 1 changed from +6.95% in 2023 to -13.29% in 2024, -3.17% in 2025 and -2.84% in 2026 YTD.
Several variants showed isolated 2025 strength but negative 2024 and/or 2026, demonstrating regime inversion rather than stable edge.
entries.evidence: 320 unique masks and 26 eligible stable pre-2024 execution variants produced a frozen Top-10; zero passed test2024/eval2025 criteria. Exact activation Jaccard versus reference REX events was 0.0, confirming independence but not profitability.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds used 2020-2022 only; 2023 and half-years selected the manifest while 2024+ rows were physically absent; 2024/2025/2026 were replay-only. This is clean failure evidence for the exact static symmetric usage.
entries.tier_rationale: Gamma usage record: broad agreement/disagreement combinations failed clean frozen OOS across all Top-10 candidates. This rejects the static symmetric usage, not the underlying raw features in other dynamic regimes.
entries.next_action: Do not retry fixed symmetric local-impulse × microstructure tails. A future retry must use a predeclared dynamic regime/state transition mechanism and a new untouched forward period.

entries.name: Funding/premium LR-impact long with hourly OI transition veto
entries.description: Exact failed use of delayed completed-hour Binance BTC open-interest transition states as a negative-state veto on the fixed funding/premium + central lr_impact_72 long alpha.
data_sources: Binance USD-M BTCUSDT funding and premium index
usable_for: failure provenance only; raw OI remains a beta feature and may be reconsidered only through a materially different mechanism with fresh forward data
known_failures: Both frozen pre-2024 policies failed alpha-pool qualification.
Best six-state veto achieved only 2024/2025/2026 ratios 2.59/1.52/2.00 with 17/15/18 trades.
Best combined ratio was 1.53 versus 3.03 for the unchanged base; the veto removed 19 of 69 base trades and reduced absolute return from 68.88% to 36.74%.
At 10bp/side the best combined ratio fell to 1.38.
entries.evidence: Pre-2024 thresholds and two eligible transition-veto policies were manifest-frozen and replayed exactly. OI inputs were low-correlated with base features (max |rho| 0.142), but neither transition representation added economic value.
entries.leakage_notes: OI thresholds and state rankings used 2021-04-15..2022-12-31; policy selection used only 2023/H1/H2 while all source prefixes were physically pre-2024. Frozen policies were replay-only on 2024-2026. A pre-OOS zero-candidate floor correction is retained explicitly.
entries.tier_rationale: Gamma applies to the exact static first-order transition-veto usage. Raw delayed OI features remain beta because this test shows negative incremental value for one gate design, not universal absence of OI information.
entries.next_action: Do not retry three/six-state first-order OI vetoes on this base or retune their states on 2024-2026. Require a materially different mechanism and fresh forward evidence.

entries.name: Completed-trade causal online selector over fixed six-sleeve universe
entries.description: Exact failed use of rolling completed counterfactual trade utility to rank and gate six existing long/short BTC sleeves online.
data_sources: Binance USD-M BTCUSDT funding and premium index
usable_for: failure provenance only; fixed expert signals remain independently usable
known_failures: Seven frozen Top-10 rows cleared standalone annual metric gates, but none added value versus the deterministic no-learning union on both combined return and CAGR/MDD.
Best post-replay selector member returned 107.68% with CAGR/MDD 4.93 over 2024-2026, versus 180.12% and 5.62 for the deterministic union.
The selector discarded profitable concurrent opportunities and therefore reduced both absolute return and risk efficiency.
The six source sleeves were defined after this programme had inspected 2024-2026, so the strong historical figures are not fresh-data OOS evidence.
entries.evidence: A 54-policy selector grid was ranked and path-deduplicated on physically pre-2024 inputs. Rewards entered history only after actual expert exits. Frozen replay was exact, but incremental comparison rejected every selector.
entries.leakage_notes: Selector hyperparameters and Top-10 paths used only pre-2024 source prefixes; current/future event outcomes were never released before exit. However, expert definitions themselves came from later-window-exposed research, and rank 8 was identified after replay.
entries.tier_rationale: Gamma applies only to completed-trade Top-K filtering of this six-sleeve universe. It does not demote the underlying sleeves or all possible portfolio sizing algorithms.
entries.next_action: Do not retune Top-K/lookback/MAE thresholds on 2024-2026. Search genuinely independent signals, or evaluate a predeclared allocation method only on fresh forward data.

entries.next_action: Require a materially different event definition such as phase-slip resynchronization; do not tune TE windows, tails, gaps or holds.
